rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Elec. Code §257.002, which governs political party use of corporate or labor union contributions. No overlap in subject matter exists.
quote: A political party that accepts a contribution authorized by Section 253.104 may use the contribution only to:
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns election finance, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
